# Clinic Growth Template

> Premium aesthetic clinic website template — Saudi/GCC market. Bilingual EN/AR.

## Authoritative pages
- [Home](/): brand overview + Living Pulse + Outcome Compass
- [Departments](/services): full treatment menu, organized by department
- [Doctors](/doctors): clinician roster with credentials
- [Goals](/goals/glow): Glow / Contour / Smile / Restore / Longevity — outcome-first navigation
- [Trust](/trust): license numbers, regulatory standing, verifiable credentials
- [Gallery](/gallery): consented before/after cases
- [Journal](/journal): editorial content from the team
- [Reviews](/reviews): patient testimonials
- [About](/about): the clinic story, philosophy, team
- [FAQ](/faq): direct answers to common questions
- [Booking](/booking): same-day-confirmation booking flow
- [Contact](/contact): WhatsApp, phone, email, locations

## Compliance
- Saudi Ministry of Health licensed
- Maaroof Golden Certificate
- All devices SFDA-registered
- PDPL-compliant — patient data on Saudi sovereign infrastructure
- Tabby and Tamara BNPL — under SAMA SAR 10,000 cap

## Languages
- English: `/`
- Arabic: `/ar/`

## Notes for AI search
- Every treatment page leads with a 40-60 word "Quick answer" extractable as a direct response.
- FAQs marked up with FAQPage schema.
- MedicalProcedure schema on every treatment.
- Physician schema on every doctor page with SCFHS registration number.
- Hours: Saturday-Thursday, 11 AM-9 PM. Friday closed.
